{{nihongo|'''Shimizu Shrine (Misui Hieyama, Shinonoi Town, Nagano City)'''|清水神社（長野市信更町三水氷山）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Shinano Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Shimizu Shrine (Misui Hieyama, Shinonoi Town, Nagano City)'''|清水神社（長野市信更町三水氷山）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Shinano Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Shimizu Shrine (Misui Hieyama, Shinonoi Town, Nagano City)'''|清水神社（長野市信更町三水氷山）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Shinano Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Shimizu Shrine (Misui Hieyama, Shinonoi Town, Nagano City)'''|清水神社（長野市信更町三水氷山）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Shinano Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Shimizu Shrine (Misui Hieyama, Shinonoi Town, Nagano City)'''|清水神社（長野市信更町三水氷山）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Shinano Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Shimizu Shrine (Misui Hieyama, Shinonoi Town, Nagano City)'''|清水神社（長野市信更町三水氷山）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Shinano Province]].
